notes: Maritime industry association representing shipowners, operators, brokers. Publishes standard charter-party clauses including the BIMCO Cyber Security Clause for time charters and voyage charters. Members-only.

data.official_name: BIMCO Cyber Security Clause for Time Charter Parties and Voyage Charter Parties
data.notes: Members-only. Standardised cyber-security contractual language for charter parties, now widely adopted in maritime trade.
